description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: The Root Edit process begins with a SPK token holder submitting a proposal through the Powerhouse system containing a draft Artifact Edit Proposal. A SPK token holder must hold at least 1% of the

total token supply to submit a proposal. The proposal must also be posted on the Sky Forum under the "Spark Prime" category. The proposal must include an upfront review of opportunities and associated risks, outlining expected benefits, potential risks, and corresponding mitigation strategies for consideration by the community.
